company_name.description: The name of the company being scored.

company_domain.description: The primary website domain of the company (e.g., notion.so).

icp_criteria.description: The Ideal Customer Profile definition used to assess firmographic and behavioral fit.

employee_count_min.description: Minimum employee count for ICP fit.

employee_count_max.description: Maximum employee count for ICP fit.

funding_stages.description: Acceptable funding stages (e.g., ['Series A', 'Series B', 'Series C']).

behavioral_filters.description: Optional behavioral signals to check (e.g., job postings, technographics).

company_research.description: Free-text research notes about the company from a prior research agent or human analyst.

crm_data.description: Serialized or summarized CRM data about existing contacts or activity at this company.
